# scafld

> Sourcey-oriented llms.txt reference for agent readers, generated from the pinned source at commit b7052022c0ec7af2b22c8140be27cfa39f6ac97d.

## Project
scafld is a governed agent-work lifecycle tool. It helps agents and operators run a task through plan, harden, approve, build, review, complete, finalize, and verify stages.

## Core commands
- `scafld init` — initialize `.scafld/`
- `scafld plan <task-id>` — create or open a task spec
- `scafld harden <task-id>` — adversarially check the spec
- `scafld approve <task-id>` — approve a hardened spec
- `scafld build <task-id>` — run/track the build phase
- `scafld review <task-id>` — review the implemented work
- `scafld complete <task-id>` — mark task complete
- `scafld finalize <task-id> --json` — produce a sealed receipt
- `scafld verify <receipt.json>` — verify a sealed receipt

## Agent usage map
- Use scafld before external delivery when work needs a public governance trail.
- Record harden-gate findings as evidence when a bounty/review asks what changed.
- Keep receipts and evidence public when a third party needs to verify the work.

## Source pin
- Repository: https://github.com/nilstate/scafld
- Pinned source commit used for this reference: b7052022c0ec7af2b22c8140be27cfa39f6ac97d
- Tooling observed: Sourcey 3.6.5, runx-cli 0.6.14
